pi_items.source: Task description specifies 'Streaming Media Consumption 2025' survey title; export_result.sh queries for title LIKE '%Streaming%'
Task description explicitly lists answer options with these codes: S01=Netflix, S02=Hulu, S03=Disney+, S04=Amazon Prime Video, S05=HBO Max, NONE=None of the above
Task requires 'Multiple Choice question'; LimeSurvey documentation confirms 'M' is the type code for Multiple Choice (QT_M_MULTIPLE_CHOICE); export_result.sh queries for type='M'

Task requires 'Enable Random order (randomization)'; LimeSurvey manual (https://www.limesurvey.org/manual/QS:Random_order) confirms 'random_order' is the attribute name; export_result.sh queries for attribute='random_order'

Task requires 'Configure Exclusive option logic so that selecting NONE unchecks other options'; LimeSurvey manual (https://www.limesurvey.org/manual/QS:Exclusive_option) confirms 'exclusive_option' is the attribute name; export_result.sh queries for attribute='exclusive_option'

privileged_info_summary: The task is to create a LimeSurvey survey titled 'Streaming Media Consumption 2025' with a Multiple Choice (type 'M') screener question containing six answer options with specific codes (S01-S05 for streaming services, NONE for None of the above). The question must have the 'random_order' attribute enabled for randomization and 'exclusive_option' attribute configured for NONE to create mutually exclusive behavior. All metadata claims about attribute names and question type have been independently verified against LimeSurvey's official documentation.
